lon_year.text: ปีเฉลี่ยคืน

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lon_year , ' ' as c_div_code , sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lonint_rate , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description,
sc_mem_m_capital_rate.entry_date , sc_mem_m_capital_rate.entry_id ,sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account ,sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account ,sc_acc_m_account_year.close_account_status FROM sc_mem_m_capital_rate ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_acc_m_account_year where sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lon_year /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_capital_rate.lon_year ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type
